neurons.description: Elder Ray bull/bear power at entry
neurons.logic: bull_power_pos / bear_power / bull_power_neg based on elder_ray field
aroon_strong_up / aroon_strong_down / aroon_neutral based on aroon_signal field

neurons.description: Chande Momentum Oscillator state at entry
neurons.logic: strong_bullish_cmo / strong_bearish_cmo / neutral_cmo based on chande_momentum field

neurons.description: Detrended Price Oscillator signal at entry
neurons.logic: dpo_above_zero / dpo_zero_cross / dpo_below_zero based on dpo_signal field

neurons.description: Price deviation from VWAP percentage at entry
neurons.logic: far_above_vwap if vwap_dev_pct > 2.0, far_below_vwap if vwap_dev_pct < -2.0, else near_vwap
ad_rising / ad_falling / ad_flat based on ad_trend field
above_chandelier / at_chandelier / below_chandelier based on chandelier_bull field

neurons.description: Percentage Price Oscillator signal at entry
neurons.logic: ppo_positive_cross / ppo_positive / ppo_negative based on ppo_signal field
coppock_rising_pos / coppock_rising_neg / coppock_falling based on coppock_curve field

neurons.description: Hull Moving Average signal at entry
neurons.logic: hull_bullish / hull_bearish / hull_neutral based on hull_ma_signal field
